findings.location: s8 (List型/配列の要素のプロパティを受け渡す場合)
findings.description: The sending-side Action class code (doRW11AC0301) for the List/Array case is entirely absent from the knowledge file. The source shows how to query data, construct a UserEmailAddressEntity[] array from SqlResultSet, populate it via a loop, wrap it in W11AC03Form, set the array size property, and register the form in request scope via setRequestScopedVar. This is substantive implementation guidance for the Action→JSP data flow that an AI would need to answer questions about passing array data from an Action class to JSP.
findings.source_evidence: Source section 'List型/配列の要素のプロパティを受け渡す場合', Actionクラスの実装例 (JSPにデータを受け渡すActionクラス): complete doRW11AC0301 method including UserEmailAddressEntity[] array construction, SqlResultSet iteration, W11AC03Form setup, and ctx.setRequestScopedVar("W11AC03", form)
